[CLS] dog sat [SEP]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="55" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc_emb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Embedding + Pos.
